items.title: Artemis II blasts ever closer to the far side of the Moon
items.dek: The mission's last, big push on its lunar journey takes humans out of the Earth's orbit for the first time since 1972.
items.body: The mission's last, big push on its lunar journey takes humans out of the Earth's orbit for the first time since 1972.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Rapper Gucci Mane was the target of kidnapping and robbery plot by Pooh Shiesty, DOJ says
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Luka (hamstring) leaves Lakers' game in OKC
items.dek: Lakers star Luka Doncic exited Thursday's game against the Thunder early because of a strained left hamstring.
items.body: Lakers star Luka Doncic exited Thursday's game against the Thunder early because of a strained left hamstring.
